channel.title: Protocol on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Protocol on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Quiet Standardisation of Agent Protocols - MCP, A2A, ACP Compared
item.description: While the headlines were about model launches, the agent ecosystem quietly converged on three protocols that matter - MCP, A2A, and ACP. A grounded comparison of what each one actually does, where they overlap, and which to bet on if you are building agents in 2026.
